name: add_reply_to_pull_request_comment
description: Add a reply and/or reaction to an existing pull request comment. This can create a new comment linked as a reply to the specified comment, add an emoji reaction to the specified comment, or do both. At least one of body or reaction is required.

body.description: The text of the reply. Required unless reaction is provided.

commentId.description: The numeric ID of the pull request review comment to reply or react to. Use the number from a #discussion_r... anchor, not the GraphQL thread node ID (PRRT_...).

pullNumber.description: Pull request number. Required when body is provided.

reaction.description: Emoji reaction to add. Required unless body is provided.
